# Kenney Platformer Characters

- Source: https://www.kenney.nl/assets/platformer-characters
- Author: Kenney (https://www.kenney.nl)
- Pack version: 1.0
- License: Creative Commons CC0 1.0 Universal
- Downloaded: 2026-07-11

The original pack contains five characters with 24 poses each. This vendored
copy keeps its PNG directory intact; vector sources and preview images not
needed by the game were omitted.

Each character tilesheet is 720 x 330 pixels and uses a 9 x 3 grid of
80 x 110 pixel cells.
